title: Gurugram、Haryana — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Gurugram、Haryana的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Gurugram是Haryana的一個城市，人口約1,200,000。India’s corporate capital and a major IT and financial hub southwest of Delhi, known for its skyscrapers and modern infrastructure.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
